since_last: 24% of 87 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +0.13%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC -3.47% · Gold +1.02% · Nasdaq100 -0.10%. 24% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +0.13%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.13%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +9.89%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.51% at $153.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
